source_jobs.title: Tech Lead Engineer (Orchestration)
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION AND VISION

At Solidgate, our mission is clear: to empower outstanding entrepreneurs to build exceptional internet companies. We exist to fuel the builders — the ones shaping the digital economy — with the financial infrastructure they deserve. To achieve that, we're on a bold path: to become the #1 payments orchestration platform in the world.

We believe the future of payments is shaped by people who think big, take ownership, and bring curiosity and drive to everything they do. That's exactly the kind of teammates we want on board.

Solidgate is part of Endeavor — a global community of the world's most impactful entrepreneurs. We're proud to be the first payment orchestrator from Europe to join — and to share our expertise within a network of outstanding global companies.




ABOUT THE TEAM AND ROLE

You'll join the Orchestration team and take ownership of the Payment Router — one of the core components of our platform. It lets merchants and operations specialists flexibly configure routing and processing rules, so they integrate with us once instead of connecting to a dozen different providers, and get the best conversion thanks to our business logic.

This is a high-load, technologically complex product with strict requirements for correctness, reliability, high availability, and low latency. We're currently exploring AI-driven options to simplify configuration for our merchants — so there's plenty of interesting work ahead.

This is a leadership role, and we want to be upfront about the path to it. Because of the depth of the domain and our experience onboarding leads, the first 6–9 months are focused on working as a Senior Engineer — getting deep into the product, the architecture, and the team — before stepping into the Tech Lead role in full. You'll be mentored and onboarded directly by the team's manager throughout this transition.

Your team — 4 Go Engineers, 2 Frontend Engineers, Product Manager, AQA Engineer.

Explore our technology stack ➡️ here https://solidgate-tech.github.io/.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Your focus will be on:

 - leading the team technically and as a people manager — mentoring engineers, setting up processes, prioritizing work, and giving constructive feedback

 - designing key services of our distributed system

 - building new functionality and supporting and improving existing services

 - making architectural decisions and setting technical direction

 - balancing priorities between completing our routing migration (V1 → V2), shipping new features, and steadily reducing tech debt

This is a hands-on leadership role: expect to spend roughly 50–60% of your time coding. We don't have "pure managers" here — leads stay close to the product through code.

We rely on automated testing over manual QA, with a modern CI/CD pipeline, test coverage, and Blue-Green Deployment. We deploy several times a day and ship merchant-facing features within each quarter.




YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE

 - 6+ years of backend engineering experience

 - Strong experience with distributed systems

 - Solid experience with PostgreSQL

 - Experience with message brokers (Kafka / RabbitMQ)

 - Strong backend skills in a statically typed language (Java/Kotlin/TypeScript/etc.)

 - Understanding of high-load system design

 - People-management experience (~1.5–2 years ideal; we'll also consider a strong Senior ready to grow into the lead role, with a longer ramp-up period)

 - A proactive, ownership-driven mindset and the ability to explain complex ideas in simple terms

At this stage we value leadership qualities slightly above pure engineering depth: the team already has strong engineers, and what they need is someone who can lead them, set priorities, and keep the high-level picture in focus.




NICE TO HAVE

 - Go, AWS SQS, Buf, Protobuf, Node.js

 - Experience designing and building high-load systems

 - Fintech / payments experience

 - Experience with no-code / low-code automation




WHY SOLIDGATE?

Our Mission and Vision

At Solidgate, our mission is clear: to empower outstanding entrepreneurs to build exceptional internet companies. We exist to fuel the builders — the ones shaping the digital economy — with the financial infrastructure they deserve. To achieve that, we’re on a bold path: to become the #1 payments orchestration platform in the world.

About the Role

Solidgate builds financial infrastructure for fast-growing internet businesses worldwide. Our platform processes millions of payments daily and operates in a highly regulated fintech environment, where security is a core product requirement — not an afterthought.

Our engineering organization builds and scales a complex cloud-native platform with over 120 microservices. As the company continues to grow, we are strengthening our security organization and introducing a dedicated Application Security Engineer role.

The mission of this role is to keep our business and revenue safe by building security into the way we develop software — from early design decisions to CI/CD pipelines and live production systems.

This is a hands-on Application Security role focused on embedding security into the software development lifecycle and reducing real product risks.

You will work closely with engineering teams to:

 - design secure application architectures

 - improve secure coding practices

 - detect vulnerabilities early in the development lifecycle

 - continuously improve application security as part of everyday engineering work

You will have a direct impact on how secure software is built across a large microservices ecosystem, influencing standards, tooling, and engineering culture.

Explore our technology stack ➡️ here https://solidgate-tech.github.io/.

 - PR & thought leadership: expert articles, media commentary, and thought leadership content that establishes Solidgate as the go-to voice in payments.

You'll be great at this if

 - You have 2+ years in B2B/SaaS content marketing and have independently owned a company LinkedIn channel — not just contributed to one.

 - Your English is C1+ and you can write product-heavy content that doesn't sound like a manual.

 - You don't wait for a detailed brief. You show up with ideas and drive them to publish.

 - You have written case studies and product content — not just SEO articles about abstract topics.

 - Fintech or payments background? That's a major plus — but deep curiosity and a fast learning curve can get you there too.


WHY SOLIDGATE?

Real impact. Your LinkedIn post is read by CPOs and CFOs of companies we're closing. Your case study ends up in the sales deck.

True autonomy — you own the channel. Plan, decide, publish — no approval queue for every post.

Speed — minimum bureaucracy. Short feedback cycles. Decisions actually get made.

Fintech depth — go deep into the payments industry alongside a team with 10 years of experience.

Growth path — a clear road to Head of Content or Content Lead at a fintech company with global reach.

🫂 Know top talent? We’re always on the lookout. Recommend someone https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/solidgate/form/external-referral-program for our role, and if they get hired, there’s a bonus waiting for you — simple as that.

source_jobs.title: Head of Machine Learning
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION AND VISION

At Solidgate, our mission is clear: to empower outstanding entrepreneurs to build exceptional internet companies. We exist to fuel the builders — the ones shaping the digital economy — with the financial infrastructure they deserve.



We’re building the #1 payment orchestrator in the world — and the names behind us prove it. Clients include Bolt, Ajax, Nova Post, MEGOGO. Trusted by giants like J.P. Morgan. Ranked #2 in the “Employer of the Year 2026” award by Forbes Ukraine.




ABOUT THE TEAM AND ROLE

This is the first dedicated ML leadership role at Solidgate — you won't inherit a function, you'll create one.

You'll stand up the ML/AI direction from scratch — the vision, the architecture, and the team — on top of 20M+ orders and 100M+ transactions a month. The next big step is a recommendation engine and a real-time system that decides which acquiring bank routes each transaction. That's the gap you're here to fill.




WHAT YOU WILL OWN

— The vision, architecture, and roadmap for ML/AI at Solidgate — a true greenfield direction, not a maintenance handover

— Building and leading the team, combining new hires with engineers who already carry a deep payments context

— A real-time ML decisioning system with direct revenue impact

— A recommendation engine and other ML-driven features that lift merchant conversion and revenue

— Integrations of cutting-edge AI technologies to drive innovation

— Partnership with Product, Engineering, and the Data Platform team (who handle ML Ops) to solve hard modelling problems and build orchestrated training and analytics pipelines

— Clear communication of complex results to audiences from engineers to executives




OUR IDEAL CANDIDATE

— 5+ years in ML

— Proven experience building and scaling an ML function — you've done founding-level work before, not just contributed to an existing one

— Strong data science fundamentals, a master's or PhD in a quantitative discipline

— Hands-on experience designing and running experiments, plus A/B testing and experimentation design

— Feature engineering on high-cardinality transactional data

— You take the lead proactively, from idea to production, and work fluently across a wide range of stakeholders




WHY BECOME A HEAD OF ML AT SOLIDGATE?

Founding role. You build the function, the team, and the standards, and your decisions shape the direction for years.

Great product. We’ve built a fintech powerhouse that scales fast. Solidgate isn’t just an orchestration player — it’s the financial infrastructure for modern Internet businesses. From subscriptions to chargeback management, fraud prevention, and indirect tax — we’ve got it covered. We hold financial licenses in key regions and are a direct Visa & Mastercard partner and sub-reseller (top 5 globally).

Part of Endeavor. A global community of the world’s most impactful entrepreneurs.

Huge scale. You'll work with 20M+ orders and 100M+ transactions monthly, 100+ payment methods and providers.

Top-tier tech team. You'll lead and learn alongside engineers who hold the bar high and ship at fintech scale.


💌 The Extras: 30+ days off, unlimited sick leave, free office meals, health coverage, and Apple gear to keep you productive. Courses, conferences, sports, and wellness benefits — all designed for ideas, focus, and fun.

Tomorrow’s fintech needs your mindset. Come build it with us.

🫂 Know top talent? We’re always on the lookout. Refer someone https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/solidgate/form/external-referral-program for our role, and if they get hired, there’s a bonus waiting for you — simple as that.

notes: Solidgate is a fintech company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles. The company has a strong engineering core, but also has a significant number of sales and marketing roles.
